title: Unfettered Italian Potato Hash
description: A rustic, herb-laden Italian hash of charlotte potatoes and mirepoix cooked to a tender finish in a fondue pot.
instructions: Heat the fondue pot over medium heat and add the olive oil.
Add the diced carrot, celery, and onion, and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the minced rosemary, thyme, and red pepper flakes, and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the diced potatoes, season with salt and pepper, and stir to coat the potatoes evenly.
Cover the pot with the lid and simmer, stirring every 2 minutes, until the potatoes are tender, about 15 minutes.
Sprinkle the lemon zest and chopped parsley over the hash and stir to combine.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Remove from heat and let the hash rest for 5 minutes to settle the flavors.
Serve warm, optionally with a side of roasted veggies or a fresh green salad.
